## Runtime.Session.MoldedBonBonEditingSession.setFrames() method

Sets frames and buffer percentage for yield calculation. Count is computed as: frames × cavitiesPerFrame

**Signature:**

```typescript
setFrames(frames: number, bufferPercentage?: number): Result<IMoldedBonBonYield>;
```
